themes.title: Domain Concentration Pattern Exploration
themes.description: Applicant's academic profile shows concentration of 14 entries in science and mathematics domains.

themes.title: Leadership Presence Pattern Analysis
themes.description: Applicant held leadership positions in 4 activities.

themes.title: Test Performance Pattern Review
themes.description: Score of 99.74 achieved in JEE Mains.

questions: How did your interest in science and mathematics develop over time?
Can you walk through one project or activity that demonstrates domain concentration?
What responsibilities did you handle in each leadership position?
How did decisions get made in those settings?
Can you describe one activity that stood out to you and why it was significant?
How do you balance multiple activities with academic responsibilities?
What strategies did you use to achieve a score of 99.74 in JEE Mains?
How do you handle test anxiety or pressure?
